programme.title: Dueños del paraíso: Familia dividida
programme.desc: Anastasia adquiere un nuevo centro de operaciones, ella enfrenta a los hijos de Nataniel, Silvana y Elías, quienes quieren su herencia. Conrado confirma la calidad de la mercancía.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Traición con traición se paga y Quintanilla entiende que la vida le pasó factura. Sara llega a su límite con la Tuti, quien puede no ser la única embarazada de la casa.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Manuel va con la Tuti a hacerse la prueba de compatibilidad. Josefina también se hace la prueba de embarazo. Temeroso, Alfredo pone en marcha su próxima misión. El Indio ayuda a Berta.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: El dueño de la cabaña, desde hace 20 años, es un empresario canadiense, y es necesario hablar con él para identificar al secuestrador. Nada ni nadie detiene a Cabrera con ese dato.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Salvador, cada vez más presionado por quienes lo rodean, tarda más en regresar a la cabaña. Frida ya no tiene alimentos y toma una medida desesperada. Nueva orden de la fiscal para Abelardo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio envía a Chacorta para ajustar cuentas con Leonor e Ignacio por la muerte de Heriberto: la orden es asesinarlos a todos. Ximena está desconsolada, y culpa a su exesposo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Ignacio intenta interrogar al Manotas, pero la rabia se lo impide, y lo mata. Comienza a vengarse de todos los que participaron en la muerte de su padre. Victoria gana las elecciones.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Elsa insiste en reunirse con el Chema, pero ya no tiene mucho que ofrecerle, y él le envenena la comida. Ernesto confiesa a su nuevo patrón que Aurelio está vivo, y le busca pruebas.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Interrogan a Ángela sobre la muerte de Isabel Uriarte. La guardaespaldas le confiesa a la persona equivocada que está enamorada de Juan Marcos. Fernanda ordena la muerte de Génesis.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Génesis es el blanco del odio de Fernanda. Luis le informa a Fernanda que no consiguió la gente que ella le había pedido para llevar a cabo el plan de matar a Génesis dentro de la clínica.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Ángela encuentra a Génesis con vida tras el accidente. Génesis le dice a Juan Marcos que Ángela es la única mujer que ella aceptaría cerca de él.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos quiere que Ángela cuide de nuevo a Génesis. Pablo le aclara a Emma que él ha regresado a la mansión Arroyo solo por lo que le pasó a Génesis.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Samantha descubre que el nombre de su hijo es Lucas. Perla le confiesa a Bernardo que Sam y Willy tuvieron un hijo. Ángela no cree en una relación con Juan Marcos.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Luis le entrega a Ángela una supuesta prueba de su amor, un rosario de oro que le robó a Fernanda y que perteneció a la madre de Juan Marcos. Willy besa a Samantha y hacen el amor. Están a punto de descubrir al atacante de Génesis.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Arrestan a Luis tras una denuncia de Juan Marcos y Ángela lo visita en la cárcel, quiere saber si es culpable. Juan Marcos recibe datos sobre la muerte de Isabel y de sus padres. Willy le cuenta a Bernardo que lo amenazan.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: El detective descubre que Fernanda es una asesina. Ella y Luis celebran haber acabado con el inspector Marshall. Willy conoce a Frida Brown, su nueva guardaespaldas. Luis le dice a Ángela que le tendieron una trampa.

programme.desc: El pulpo es lo más parecido a un alienígena que hemos visto en la Tierra. Viajemos al Oceáno Pacífico para conocer más acerca de ellos.

programme.title: Las superbabosas marinas
programme.desc: Los invertebrados más coloridos del océano, los nudibraquios o babosas de mar, se adaptan increíblemente para sobrevivir en el océano.

programme.title: El renacimiento del bosque subacuático
programme.desc: Los bosques de algas marinas ayudan a albergar mayor variedad y diversidad de plantas y animales que casi cualquier otra comunidad marina.

programme.title: La ciencia de la ternura
programme.desc: La domesticación transformó a los lobos en perros. Nuevos hallazgos muestran que los perros levantan las cejas más que los lobos. ¿Por qué?

programme.title: Antártida: ciencia bajo cero
programme.desc: La Antártida es misteriosa e inexplorada. Científicos del Instituto Antártico Chileno estudian el cambio climático en condiciones extremas.

programme.title: El Amazonas incendiado
programme.desc: Más de 60,000 incendios azotaron el Amazonas en 2019. ¿Qué los causó? ¿Cómo afectarán la crisis climática? ¿Se recuperará el Amazonas?

programme.title: El rescate de un osezno
programme.desc: Casey Anderson se enfrentó con la decisión de dejar que un osezno pardo huérfano muera en la naturaleza o salvarlo.

programme.title: Escuela para ballenas
programme.desc: Sigue a una familia de cachalotes en el corazón del Océano Índico. Daremos a conocer al depredador dentado más grande de la Tierra.

programme.title: Chungungo: la nutria más pequeña del mundo

programme.title: Explosión de vida
programme.desc: Desde flores salvajes hasta grandes colonias de medusas en Monterrey e increíbles olas que brillan en la oscuridad, esto es California.

programme.title: El mundo submarino secreto
programme.desc: Embárcate en un viaje con el afamado fotógrafo submarino Peter Kragh, mientras explora la costa de California.

programme.title: Invasión de hormigas rojas

programme.title: Bahía de cocodrilos

programme.desc: María busca darle celos a Albertano y busca un hombre guapo en un catálogo. Al verlos, Albertano se muere de celos y le confiesa al Chino que la quiere y le duele verla con alguien más.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Una mujer asalta la carnicería de Don Cosme y golpea a Diego. Teo encuentra a José en el hospital y se enfrenta a ella, pero es golpeado por Luciano. Roberta encuentra a Alma y Franco a punto de besarse. Miguel le confiesa a Mia que vio a Sabrina.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le pide a su mamá que no tenga ninguna relación con Franco porque es el papá de Mía y debido a que también son muy diferentes.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lola golpea a Lupita. León manda a clausurar la carnicería de los papás de Giovanni. Mía le dice a Miguel que ya no se enojará de que Sabrina sea su amiga a cambio de que no le oculte nada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Iñaki se queda sin Paloma y Roberta. León ordena a Diego que deje la banda como condición para reabrir la carnicería. Alma le dice a Franco que deben olvidar sus sentimientos. Sabrina busca a Miguel en el colegio y se encuentra con Mia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego consigue a los padres de Giovanni dos locales más grandes para su carnicería. Franco convence a Alma para iniciar una relación. Paloma llama a Iñaki mi amor delante de Roberta. Mia se enfrenta a Sabrina y le pregunta si ha besado a Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Iñaki se niega a presentar a Roberta a sus padres como su novia. Diego confiesa que su padre le obligó a dejar la banda. Rocco descubre que Tato está vendiendo artículos robados. Roberta exige a Reverte que le cuente su historia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Reverte miente a Roberta para que no descubra que es su padre. Lola intenta seducir a Diego, pero éste la rechaza. Roberta se entera de que Iñaki ni siquiera tiene primos. Alma y Franco planean vivir con Roberta para que ella acepte a Franco.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre

programme.title: Porque el amor manda

programme.title: Porque el amor manda

programme.title: Porque el amor manda

programme.title: Porque el amor manda

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Dolly aprueba el matrimonio de Eduardo y Erika. Steve le pide a Camilo que se case con Venus o de lo contrario no volverá a verla. Bárbara idea un plan para encontrar a Aurora.

programme.sub-title: La medida del amor es que no tiene medida

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.sub-title: Agua que no has de beber

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: This war is a family feud. Two father/son teams go head-to-head to build the ultimate deck for kids. Rosario and his son Antonio are Team Black and Gerry and his son Mike are Team Red. Will internal family strife get in the way of victory? Two decks in two exhausting days - family pride on the line and one kick-ass trophy. The winner of this war is chosen by Decked Out's Paul Lafrance, who seeks the advice of construction expert, and host of Builder Boss, Jim Caruk.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: It's time to party! This war is all about building the perfect party pad for the backyard - the ultimate party deck. Two teams of professional deck builders face-off to design and build party decks - putting their professional reputations on the line in hopes of walking away with the Deck Wars trophy. Oren and Andrew are Team Black and BJ and Jeremy are Team Red. Who's going to pop the champagne? The winner of this war is chosen by Decked Out's Paul Lafrance, who seeks the advice of construction expert, and host of Builder Boss, Jim Caruk.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: This is the ultimate of all ultimate Deck Wars! Decked Out's Paul Lafrance goes head-to-head against Leave it to Bryan's Bryan Baeumler. Two unbelievably awesome builders lay everything on the line to try and take home the Deck Wars trophy - and capture a lifetime's worth of bragging rights. Paul and his crack team from Decked Out are Team Black. Bryan and his great construction team are Team Red. The theme for this war is Freestyle - design and build whatever you want. Two totally awesome decks built in just two grueling days. The judges for this war are Income Property's Scott McGillivray, construction guru Damon Bennett, and Builder Boss' Jim Caruk. An epic battle for the ultimate victory.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: This war is all about the shade - two decks designed and built to achieve the title of Ultimate Pergola Deck. Team Black is Tim and Billy Joel. Team Red is Conor and Canon. They push to make the impossible possible - two decks in just two days. Pride is on the line. Victory will go to just one team. Who has the design to win? Who will go home a loser? The winner of this war is chosen by Decked Out's Paul Lafrance, who seeks the advice of construction expert Damon Bennett.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: I.T. Professional and father of two, Darren is extremely active and adventurous. After all he plays volleyball, canoes, bike, snowmobiles, does adventure races and even proposed to Sue, his wife of ten years atop Mt. Kilimanjaro. Although fearless in many areas of his life, he considers himself to be reckless and easily distracted in the kitchen. This may explain his continued history of culinary calamities. From setting his entire barbeque ablaze with unattended chicken on a spit to annihilating a $200 piece of beef tenderloin in a misguided attempt at his mother's famous Beef Wellington (something he has always wanted to make), Darren is a mess in the kitchen – literally… as he drives his wife to distraction with his continual need to dirty every pot in the house. If that wasn't enough, then Darren's struggle to make gravy, which always turns out as a “mud puddle” and his persistent belief that when it comes to garlic, “more is never enough” is prime fodder for a culinary intervention. Christine will have her work cut out for her as she applies the brakes to Darren's ‘full throttle' culinary approach if she ever hopes to help him live up to his life motto of being “In it – to win it!”

programme.desc: Paul shows you how to cook incredible Lamb and Fennel seed skewers A Classic soup with Goats Cheese Scones A surprise little dish using up leftovers and the most amazing rice dish you'll ever see. All this plus loads of fun along the way in this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you in this episode that with simple techniques and perfect seasoning, you can create amazing recipes at home with easy to find ingredients. If you can't find one type of pasta, just use another. If you see something you like, just add it in to your favourite recipe. That's the beauty of food – There are no limitations as to what you can cook!! (S1 E02)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: If you blink you'll miss the first dish!! The fastest and tastiest cooked salmon recipe. A fantastic Portabello Mushroom recipe that both vegetarians and meat eaters will both love. Bruschetta three different ways and finished off with a stunning Mediterranean Pork dish is what is in store throughout this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen (S1 E04)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, Paul shows you how to cook an amazing dinner party recipe when he stuffs a whole Haddock, Jamaican style. A really quick sweet chilli chicken salad and then Treyvaud's epic steak sandwich with a Flambé you'll have to see to believe. And to finish off the show, a simple but incredible Plum tart. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul teaches you the history and the anatomy of Venison before cooking a mouth-watering salad with venison loin, pear and blue cheese. Then a great family dinner with Paul's take on Chicken Parmesan. And after showing you just how simple it is to cook Monkfish, Paul finishes the show off with his amazing take on an old Irish classic Bread and Butter Pudding!! (S1 E06)

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels

Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: Inane Clown Posse
programme.desc: Froy and Matt have to wrangle with some angry clowns when they try to repossess a bouncy castle. Meanwhile, Lou and Sonia lose patience with a debtor over a recycling truck.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: Russian Roulette
programme.desc: Matt and Sonia take on an award winning fencing coach, but all bets are off when his students go on the offensive with real swords.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade. Then, Matt and Froy head out to the country to reclaim a Prius from a quintet of socially maladapted role-players.

programme.title: The Final Showdown
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession. There's only one problem: it belongs to somebody who is like family to them.

programme.title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia. And finally, Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition.

programme.title: Life In Miniature
programme.desc: Kath Holden is an artist of the everyday. Inspired by the world around her, Kath's creations are whimsical yet keenly observed, and a far cry from the genteel museum pieces that her contemporaries are producing. A proud Yorkshire woman, Kath reflects on her life and art as she carves a place for herself in the precious world of miniatures. Directed by Ellen Evans.

programme.title: Bodega De Edgar
programme.desc: The courageous story of Edgar Torres immigrating to the US illegally with his father in the 80's, becoming a wine expert and starting a winery in Paso Robles, CA to give his children a better future. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Five Years North
programme.desc: Five Years North is the coming-of-age story of Luis, an undocumented Guatemalan boy who just arrived alone in New York City. Directed by Chris Temple and Zach Ingrasci.

programme.title: Gotta Groove Records
programme.desc: A short film on the history and resurgence of vinyl records from the perspective of an artist focused pressing plant in Cleveland, Ohio. A hero story about grit, manufacturing and warm tones. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In the southern state of Oaxaca where, in the indigenous communities around the town of Juchitán, the world is not divided simply into males and females. The local Zapotec people have made room for a third category, which they call “muxes” - men who consider themselves women and live in a socially sanctioned limbo between the two genders. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: We Are Oscar Mike
programme.desc: Through his non-profit foundation, Oscar Mike, Noah helps rehabilitate other veterans through the adaptive sports that saved his own life. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: How To Make A Rainbow
programme.desc: The story of a young girl and her mother, observed over the course of two years, as they move together through transitions of home, identity and name. Directed by Ryan Maxey.

programme.title: Ode To Desolation
programme.desc: There used to be thousands of fire lookout posts across the US, but now, because of the advancement of satellite technology, there are about 60 left. Jim Henterly holds his post as the eyes and ears of the historic Desolation Peak Fire Lookout - in an effort to preserve the human narrative. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: A Fat Wreck: The Punk-u-mentary
programme.desc: Fat Wreck Chords... The influential music label proud to say they've spent the past 25 years “ruining punk rock”. A Fat Wreck tells the story of founders Fat Mike (of the legendary punk band NOFX) and his ex-wife Erin Kelly-Burkett, spanning the birth, growth, struggles, and survival of the Fat Wreck Chords label. Half inspirational story of chosen family and community, half debauchery and occasionally involuntary drug use... A Fat Wreck blazes exciting new ground in the cinematic genre of puppet-driven punk rock music documentary filmmaking. If you only see one film featuring a dominatrix spanking a puppet in your lifetime... Make it A Fat Wreck! Directed by Shaun M. Colón.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines

Threatened by deforestation which is ravaging the entire island, the iconic Malagasy animal suffers from this scourge which also contributes to the worsening of the poverty of the inhabitants. programme.title: Cliffside Beach: Indonesia

programme.title: Good Morning
programme.desc: The sound of waves crashing on the shores of Hawaii's Red Sand Beach will energize you for the day to come.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise 1
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sea turtles, for 2 full hours of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: Hidden Tropical Paradise 2
programme.desc: Have you ever wanted to just escape from it all? Now you can turn any screen into a window to a hidden garden island, located in the the remote north-eastern islands of Fiji. Begin your journey as the sun pierces through trees as vibrant blue waves break on a white sandy beach progress up the island to a lush lookout, and enjoy distant wave breaks, trees and birds, and passing clouds. Finally transport yourself back to the beach as the day continues and end it with a beautiful sunset scene as it falls over a distant mountain. It's 120 minutes of pure nature bliss!

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: Enjoy the relaxing vibe of a day at the beach with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: Hidden Tropical Paradise 2
programme.desc: Have you ever wanted to just escape from it all? Now you can turn any screen into a window to a hidden garden island, located in the the remote north-eastern islands of Fiji. Begin your journey as the sun pierces through trees as vibrant blue waves break on a white sandy beach progress up the island to a lush lookout, and enjoy distant wave breaks, trees and birds, and passing clouds. Finally transport yourself back to the beach as the day continues and end it with a beautiful sunset scene as it falls over a distant mountain. It's 120 minutes of pure nature bliss!

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: From high up on a lush and isolated cliff, plunge into the waters of Kahakuloa Bay on West Maui's rugged North Shore.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Gold
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E13: Shades Of Gold — Experience the opulent allure of an art collection adorned with the lustrous elegance of gold. These works illuminate creativity, from shimmering landscapes to gilded abstractions, embodying the richness of this resplendent hue.

programme.title: Spring Forward
programme.desc: Spring Forward S1E1 — Experience the joy of spring! Bursting with vibrant hues and whimsical strokes, each piece embodies the spirit of new beginnings. Let the colors and creativity transport you to a world of fresh perspectives and blooming possibilities.

programme.title: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions
programme.desc: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions E3 — Celebrate the beauty of spring through the luminous brushstrokes of Impressionism. Featuring works by contemporary artists & old masters, the art is accompanied by contemporary classical music, immersing viewers in the colors & rhythms of the season.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E2 — A dynamic showcase of cutting-edge pieces that redefine fashion's limits. From bold, innovative patterns to daring silhouettes, be captivated by an explosion of colors and concepts that ignite the senses.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Visual Culture E1 — An energizing experience filled with bold illustrations and street art.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Eyes On The East E1 — Immerse yourself in a vibrant tapestry of Asian American and Pacific Islander culture, where each piece resonates with the depth and diversity of this dynamic community, and mid-tempo melodies lull and transport you to an adventure of the Far East.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Women Artists Now E3: Empowered Women by HUG — Dive into a world of creativity and empowerment with a vibrant showcase by talented women artists from diverse backgrounds. Each piece is a testament to the unique power of female voices, collectively weaving a dynamic narrative of inspiration.
